description: Reviewed task-memory packet cases. These compare current flat assembly with relation-aware assembly; they do not claim broad retrieval quality or graph reasoning.

cases.notes: A clean support-chain case where both modes should find the anchor, while relation-aware assembly should preserve the direct support chain.

records.title: [[Belief]] release verification baseline
records.content:
record_type: belief
claim: Release cutover should verify benchmark and healthcheck before tagging.
support_count: 4
distinct_session_count: 3
contradiction_count: 0
confidence: 0.82
status: active

records.title: [[Concept Note]] release cutover pattern
records.content:
record_type: concept-note
concept: Release cutover verification loop.
claim: Release cutover stays safer when verification remains explicit.
rule: Verify benchmark and healthcheck before tagging.
depends_on: {{belief_release_verification}}

records.title: [[Domain]] release safety
records.content:
record_type: domain-note
domain: domain:release
claim: Release cutover benefits from explicit proof and rollback checks.

records.title: [[Procedure]] release cutover verification

cases.notes: The old and new procedures both match lexically; relation-aware assembly should keep the superseding current procedure and suppress the legacy one.

records.title: [[Procedure]] release cutover legacy
records.content:
record_type: procedure
goal: Run the older release cutover procedure.
when_to_use: Legacy cutover only.
steps: skip proof | tag release

records.title: [[Procedure]] release cutover current
records.content:
record_type: procedure
goal: Run the current release cutover procedure.
when_to_use: Normal release cutover.
steps: run benchmark | run release contract | tag release
supersedes: {{legacy_release_cutover}}

cases.notes: Two beliefs match the task, but the newer supported belief contradicts the shortcut belief. The default packet should not include both.

records.title: [[Belief]] release safety can skip healthcheck
records.content:
record_type: belief
claim: Release safety can skip healthcheck when the change looks small.
support_count: 1
distinct_session_count: 1
contradiction_count: 2
confidence: 0.31
status: active

records.title: [[Belief]] release safety requires healthcheck
records.content:
record_type: belief
claim: Release safety requires healthcheck even when the change looks small.
support_count: 5
distinct_session_count: 4
contradiction_count: 0
confidence: 0.86
status: active
contradicts: {{weak_skip_healthcheck}}

cases.notes: The procedure points at expired, future, and current context-compaction support. Relation-aware assembly should keep current support only.

records.title: [[Concept Note]] expired context compaction checklist
records.content:
record_type: concept-note
concept: Old context compaction checklist.
claim: The expired checklist used a stale handoff format.
valid_until: 2020-01-01T00:00:00+00:00

records.title: [[Belief]] future context compaction policy
records.content:
record_type: belief
claim: Future context compaction will require a schema not available yet.
valid_from: 2099-01-01T00:00:00+00:00
status: active

records.title: [[Concept Note]] current context compaction checkpoint
records.content:
record_type: concept-note
concept: Current context compaction checkpoint.
claim: The current checklist should preserve decisions, open risks, changed files, and next commands.
valid_from: 2026-01-01T00:00:00+00:00

records.title: [[Procedure]] context compaction checklist
records.content:
record_type: procedure
goal: Prepare a context compaction handoff.
when_to_use: Before a long session is paused.
steps: summarize decisions | list changed files | record next commands
depends_on: {{expired_compaction}} | {{future_compaction}} | {{current_compaction}}

cases.notes: A stale project-local procedure should not outrank a current global procedure purely because project hits are merged first.

blocked_titles: [[Procedure]] triage review queue stale project override

records.title: [[Procedure]] triage review queue stale project override
records.content:
record_type: procedure
goal: Triage review queue using the stale project override.
when_to_use: Old project workflow only.
steps: take all pending reviews | skip ownership check
valid_until: 2020-01-01T00:00:00+00:00

records.title: [[Procedure]] triage review queue current
records.content:
record_type: procedure
goal: Triage review queue using current ownership rules.
when_to_use: Any review queue handoff.
steps: inspect ownership | claim eligible item | leave owned work alone
valid_from: 2026-01-01T00:00:00+00:00
